allow: PowerShell($env:OS; [System.Environment]::OSVersion.VersionString; \(Get-Command xcodebuild -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); \(Get-Command brew -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); \(Get-Command xcodegen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); \(Get-Command swift -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); "PWD: $\(Get-Location\)")
